On August 26, 1346, the incredibly massive, incredibly lethal, and historically definitive Battle of Crécy aggressively occurred during the Hundred Years' War. The horrific, massive eruption was the absolute loudest sound in recorded human history, and the massive volcanic ash aggressively cooled the entire global climate for years.

## SECTION 9 — This Day in History (India)
On August 26, 1303, the incredibly massive, heavily fortified, and fiercely defended Rajput citadel of Chittorgarh was aggressively and absolutely captured by the massive forces of the Delhi Sultanate. By aggressively founding the massive Missionaries of Charity, her incredible, massive humanitarian work fiercely earned her the Nobel Peace Prize and absolute, immortal global saintly devotion.
